metadata.description: Plugins for mathematical computing, scientific research, and developer productivity

plugins.name: wolfram-hart
plugins.description: Gives Claude a real math engine. Translates questions to Wolfram Language, runs via wolframscript, and returns exact answers — symbolic algebra, calculus, plotting, statistics, and more.

plugins.name: compound-science
plugins.description: Research workflow toolkit for structural econometrics, causal inference, game theory, and quantitative social science. Each unit of research work makes subsequent work easier.

plugins.name: claude-codex
plugins.description: Intelligent task router that automatically delegates mechanical coding tasks to OpenAI Codex, reducing Anthropic token usage by 60-85% on simple tasks.
